findings.title: huggingface/evaluation-guidebook
findings.description: Sharing both practical insights and theoretical knowledge about LLM evaluation that we gathered while managing the Open LLM Leaderboard and designing lighteval!

findings.title: onejune2018/Awesome-LLM-Eval
findings.description: Awesome-LLM-Eval: a curated list of tools, datasets/benchmark, demos, leaderboard, papers, docs and models, mainly for Evaluation on LLMs.  一个由工具、基准/数据、演示、排行榜和大模型等组成的精选列表，主要面向基础大模型评测，旨在探求生成式AI的技术边界.

findings.title: FastEval/FastEval
findings.description: Fast & more realistic evaluation of chat language models. Includes leaderboard.

findings.title: wandb/llm-leaderboard
findings.description: Project of llm evaluation to Japanese tasks

findings.title: svilupp/Julia-LLM-Leaderboard
findings.description: Provides a platform for the Julia community to compare AI models' abilities in generating syntactically correct Julia code, featuring structured tests and automated evaluations for easy and collaborative benchmarking.

findings.title: dsdanielpark/open-llm-leaderboard-report
findings.description: Weekly visualization report of Open LLM model performance based on 4 metrics.

findings.title: InternScience/SciEvalKit
findings.description: A unified evaluation toolkit and leaderboard for rigorously assessing the scientific intelligence of large language and vision–language models across the full research workflow.

findings.title: RouteWorks/RouterArena
findings.description: RouterArena: An open framework for evaluating LLM routers with standardized datasets, metrics, an automated framework, and a live leaderboard.

findings.title: h2oai/h2o-LLM-eval
findings.description: Large-language Model Evaluation framework with Elo Leaderboard and A-B testing

findings.title: VILA-Lab/Open-LLM-Leaderboard
findings.description: Open-LLM-Leaderboard: Open-Style Question Evaluation. Paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.07545

findings.title: pinchbench/leaderboard
findings.description: PinchBench is a benchmarking system for evaluating LLM models as OpenClaw coding agents. Made with 🦀 by the humans at https://kilo.ai

findings.title: research-outcome/LLM-Game-Benchmark
findings.description: Evaluating Large Language Models with Grid-Based Game Competitions: An Extensible LLM Benchmark and Leaderboard

findings.title: logikon-ai/cot-eval
findings.description: A framework for evaluating the effectiveness of chain-of-thought reasoning in language models.

findings.title: JiaQiSJTU/UserCentricLeaderboard
findings.description: This project introduces a novel, user-centric leaderboard for Large Language Models (LLMs) that moves beyond one-size-fits-all evaluations. Our framework empowers users to create personalized rankings on subjective topics.

findings.title: mattdepaolis/llm-evaluation
findings.description: llm evaluation framework to mimic the discontinued Huggingface Open LLM Leaderboard

findings.title: leaderboard-modeles-IA-francais/evaluation-pipeline-leaderboard
findings.description: The scripts used to run the evaluation pipeline to generate fr-gouv-coordination-ia/llm_leaderboard_fr

findings.title: zainkhatri/theology-llm-evaluation
findings.description: A project dedicated to evaluating and enhancing AI language models through Islamic knowledge and ethical guidelines. It includes developing comprehensive datasets, creating evaluation frameworks, implementing grading systems, and maintaining leaderboards to ensure AI tools align with Islamic principles.
